adds: Direction-aware execution (RESTORATION of OctaFx addendum line-17, NOT a new cost model) in BOTH execution_loop.py (single-asset) and evaluate_bar.py (basket leg engine): SELL fills at bid (= ask - per-bar RESEARCH spread); BUY fills at ask. P&L formula unchanged.
evaluate_bar.py added (direction-aware copy of frozen v1.5.9) so engine_abi.v1_5_9 can re-point its source here (B'); frozen v1.5.9 preserved on disk for reproducibility.
invariants: Canonical per-bar order (in-position): SL/TP -> partial -> stop_mutation -> check_exit
Partial guard: partial_taken == False AND bars_held >= 1 AND unrealized_r >= 1.0001
Stop mutation is monotone: long tightens up only, short tightens down only; silent reject otherwise
Entry market state initial_stop_price is FROZEN; stop_price_active is live-mutable
No-hook strategies produce byte-equivalent trade dicts to v1.5.7 (and v1.5.6)
unrealized_r (close-based) is UNCHANGED from v1.5.7 — additive only
spread=0 (all RESEARCH until the CLEAN->RESEARCH embed regen) -> byte-equivalent to v1.5.8.
